data.title: Add fragile to resolve-overlay-findings.sh severity_to_score mapping
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Add fragile severity to resolve-overlay-findings.sh:
1. Add 'fragile': 3 to severity_to_score dict at line 180
2. Add 'fragile' to blocking severity check at line 106: if finding.get('severity', 'minor') in ('critical', 'important', 'fragile')
3. Fragile findings in the overlay path are handled through the blocking path (has_blocking=True), NOT the minor ticket path (lines 153-154 check for == 'minor' specifically). This means fragile findings from overlays will be surfaced as blocking findings requiring Fix or Defend in the main review, not as minor ticket suggestions. No changes needed to the minor processing block — fragile correctly falls through to blocking.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/hooks/resolve-overlay-findings.sh (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test suite passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] fragile in severity_to_score mapping
  Verify: grep -q 'fragile' plugins/dso/hooks/resolve-overlay-findings.sh
- [ ] Fragile findings are blocking
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-overlay-resolution-integration.sh 2>&1 | grep -v FAIL
